sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84532" key="pollago/rasos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολλᾰγόρᾰσος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n84532.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὁ πολλὰ ὠνούμενος</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:126" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">126</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
